options.content:
# FinDevOps - Development Cost & Capitalization

Track development costs and categorize for **US GAAP ASC 350-40** software capitalization compliance.

## Cost Allocation Formula
```
Total Cost = Hours Worked × Hourly Rate
Capitalizable = Development Stage work (features, enhancements)
Expensed = Preliminary + Post-Implementation (maintenance, bugs)
```

## ASC 350-40 Development Stages
| Stage | Capitalizable | Activities |
|-------|--------------|------------|
| **Preliminary** | ❌ No | Planning, feasibility, design |
| **Development** | ✅ Yes | Coding, testing, implementation |
| **Post-Implementation** | ❌ No | Maintenance, training, support |

## Cost Per Deployment
```
Cost Per Deployment = Total Cost (window) / Deployment Count (window)
Time Windows: 7 days (weekly), 30 days (monthly), 90 days (quarterly)
```

**Goal:** Lower cost per deployment = more efficient delivery pipeline

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(total_cost) as total FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at)
SELECT SUM(capitalizable_cost) as capitalizable FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at)
SELECT SUM(expense_cost) as expense FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at)
SELECT AVG(capitalization_rate) as rate FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at)

options.content:
## Cost Per Deployment Metrics
Lower is better - indicates efficient delivery. Compare across time windows to identify trends.

targets.rawSql: SELECT cost_per_deployment FROM deployment_costs WHERE window_days = 7 AND project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT cost_per_deployment FROM deployment_costs WHERE window_days = 30 AND project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT cost_per_deployment FROM deployment_costs WHERE window_days = 90 AND project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT project_name, window_days, DATE(period_start) as period_start, DATE(period_end) as period_end, total_cost, deployment_count, cost_per_deployment, DATE(calculated_at) as calculated FROM deployment_costs WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) ORDER BY calculated_at DESC, window_days LIMIT 30

SELECT ca.project_phase as phase, SUM(ca.total_cost) as cost FROM cost_allocations ca JOIN issues i ON ca.issue_id = i.id JOIN board_issues bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN project_mapping pm ON bi.board_id = pm.row_id AND pm.`table` = 'boards' WHERE pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND ca.issue_type in (${issue_type:sqlstring}) AND ca.capitalization_category in (${cap_category:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(ca.calculated_at) GROUP BY ca.project_phase

SELECT fiscal_month, SUM(capitalizable_cost) as capitalizable_cost, SUM(expense_cost) as expense_cost FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) GROUP BY fiscal_month ORDER BY fiscal_month

SELECT ca.capitalization_category as category, SUM(ca.total_cost) as cost FROM cost_allocations ca JOIN issues i ON ca.issue_id = i.id JOIN board_issues bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN project_mapping pm ON bi.board_id = pm.row_id AND pm.`table` = 'boards' WHERE pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND ca.issue_type in (${issue_type:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(ca.calculated_at) GROUP BY ca.capitalization_category
SELECT window_days, AVG(cost_per_deployment) as avg_cost FROM deployment_costs WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) GROUP BY window_days ORDER BY window_days

panels.title: Avg Cost Per Deployment by Window

targets.rawSql: SELECT ca.issue_id, ca.issue_type, ca.project_phase, ca.capitalization_category, ca.hours_worked, ca.hourly_rate, ca.total_cost, ca.category_reason FROM cost_allocations ca JOIN issues i ON ca.issue_id = i.id JOIN board_issues bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN project_mapping pm ON bi.board_id = pm.row_id AND pm.`table` = 'boards' WHERE pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND ca.issue_type in (${issue_type:sqlstring}) AND ca.capitalization_category in (${cap_category:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(ca.calculated_at) ORDER BY ca.total_cost DESC LIMIT 50

options.content:
## Budget Variance Tracking
Compares estimated vs actual time spent on issues (from Jira time tracking).

**Formula:** `Variance % = ((Estimated - Actual) / Estimated) × 100`

| Variance | Interpretation |
|----------|----------------|
| Positive | Under budget (faster than estimated) |
| Zero | On budget |
| Negative | Over budget (took longer than estimated) |

**Goal:** Track estimation accuracy to improve future planning.

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(budget_variance) as budget_variance FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) AND fiscal_month = (SELECT MAX(fiscal_month) FROM monthly_cost_summaries)

SELECT SUM(total_estimated_cost) as total_estimated_cost FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) AND fiscal_month = (SELECT MAX(fiscal_month) FROM monthly_cost_summaries)

SELECT SUM(total_actual_cost) as total_actual_cost FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) AND fiscal_month = (SELECT MAX(fiscal_month) FROM monthly_cost_summaries)

SELECT SUM(over_budget_issue_count) as over_budget_issue_count FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) AND fiscal_month = (SELECT MAX(fiscal_month) FROM monthly_cost_summaries)

SELECT fiscal_month, SUM(total_estimated_cost) as total_estimated_cost, SUM(total_actual_cost) as total_actual_cost FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) GROUP BY fiscal_month ORDER BY fiscal_month DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT fiscal_month, AVG(budget_variance) as budget_variance FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) GROUP BY fiscal_month ORDER BY fiscal_month DESC LIMIT 12

options.content:
## Unallocated Cost
Tracks development cost not attributed to any epic or initiative. **Target: <10%**

High unallocated cost indicates orphan issues that need epic/initiative linking for proper cost attribution.

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(unallocated_percent) as unallocated_percent FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) AND fiscal_month = (SELECT MAX(fiscal_month) FROM monthly_cost_summaries)

SELECT SUM(unallocated_cost) as unallocated_cost FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) AND fiscal_month = (SELECT MAX(fiscal_month) FROM monthly_cost_summaries)

SELECT SUM(orphan_issue_count) as orphan_issue_count FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) AND fiscal_month = (SELECT MAX(fiscal_month) FROM monthly_cost_summaries)

SELECT COUNT(*) as unallocated_issues FROM cost_allocations ca JOIN issues i ON ca.issue_id = i.id JOIN board_issues bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN project_mapping pm ON bi.board_id = pm.row_id AND pm.`table` = 'boards' WHERE ca.is_unallocated = true AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND ca.issue_type in (${issue_type:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(ca.calculated_at)

SELECT fiscal_month, AVG(unallocated_percent) as unallocated_percent FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) GROUP BY fiscal_month ORDER BY fiscal_month DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT fiscal_month, SUM(orphan_issue_count) as orphan_issue_count FROM monthly_cost_summaries WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) GROUP BY fiscal_month ORDER BY fiscal_month DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT ca.issue_id, ca.issue_type, ca.fiscal_month, ca.hours_worked, ca.total_cost, ca.estimated_minutes, ca.actual_minutes, ca.variance_minutes, ca.variance_percent, ca.over_budget FROM cost_allocations ca JOIN issues i ON ca.issue_id = i.id JOIN board_issues bi ON i.id = bi.issue_id JOIN project_mapping pm ON bi.board_id = pm.row_id AND pm.`table` = 'boards' WHERE ca.is_unallocated = true AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND ca.issue_type in (${issue_type:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(ca.calculated_at) ORDER BY ca.total_cost DESC LIMIT 50

list.definition: select distinct project_name from project_mapping where `table` = 'boards' order by project_name
